privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco UrbanSim public data (sanfran_public.h5) downloaded from the UDST repository. The environment initializes a Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/density_gradient.ipynb. The verifier validates the exact presence and structure of a generated CSV (/home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/density_by_zone.csv) containing 6 distinct columns, a JSON summary (/home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/gradient_summary.json) tracking 6 distinct metrics, and a scatter plot image (/home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/density_gradient_plot.png).
